reviews.review_description: SUPER underrated which there's more updates but it's perfect hope you keep working on the game! You should add more monsters and instead of tracking one monster on the watch it should track nearest monster. Also when you die it could be cool if you ragdoll! Overall 10/10 game with friends very funny and lots of laughs!

This game isn’t that popular but in my opinion I think it’s very underrated! It’s really fun with friends and it’s almost as good as primal fear. I’m not sure why this game isn’t popular, but anyways it is really good and fun with friends
This game reminds me of Primal Fear but Better, it has Cool Cosmetics, Scary Monsters and Interesting Decoration 10/10
